reference: Efudex is mainly used for precancerous conditions like actinic keratosis and Bowen's disease. It can be used for basal cell carcinoma, which is not amenable to local conventional therapies, but the success rate is lower than surgery—about ninety-three% versus one hundred%. So it depends upon the type of skin cancer your friend had.
text: Effudex is mainly used for precancerous conditions like actinic keratosis and Bowen's disease. It can be used for basal cell carcinoma, which is not amenable to local conventional therapies, but the success rate is lower than surgery, about 93 percent versus 100 percent. So it depends upon the type of skin cancer your friend had.
